plugins.prepareCmd: cargo build --release && (cd ui && npm ci --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build) && (cd tray && bash create-icons.sh && npm ci --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build) && bash scripts/set-version.sh ${nextRelease.version} && bash scripts/package-release.sh ${nextRelease.version} && bash scripts/verify-release-bundle.sh ${nextRelease.version} && tar -czf meridian-${nextRelease.version}-aarch64.tar.gz -C npm meridian-darwin-arm64
